content: AI features are pay-as-you-go. Credits are deducted from your balance based on actual usage.

comment.text: This text explains the pricing model for AI features, stating they operate on a pay-as-you-go basis with credits deducted based on usage. It appears within the AI Pricing and Billing dialog box, providing introductory information to the user. Translators should focus on clarity and accurately conveying the meaning of "pay-as-you-go" and usage-based billing.
